channel.title: Syntax-Highlighting on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Syntax-Highlighting on Arrans github.io

item.title: leo-arch/clifm
item.description: 💾 The shell-like, command line terminal file manager

item.title: solworktech/mdtopdf
item.description: A CLI utility that generates PDF from Markdown. Features: syntax highlighting (for code blocks), dark, light and custom themes, pagination control (using horizontal lines - especially useful for presentations), page Footer (consisting of author, title and page number), support of non-Latin charsets and multiple fonts

item.title: dbcli/mycli
item.description: A Terminal Client for MySQL with AutoCompletion and Syntax Highlighting.

item.title: aretext/aretext
item.description: Minimalist text editor with vim-compatible key bindings.

item.title: casteng/i-pascal
item.description: A free Object Pascal language plugin for IntelliJ IDEA
